model.event_clock: learned straight-through boundary gate plus recurrent slow-state cell
model.tokenizer: raw UTF-8 bytes plus existing special tokens

objectives: event-rate regularization toward 0.125 events per byte
repository or environment state-delta prediction when labeled deltas exist
fixed_controls: single-event-vector replacement while raw bytes remain fixed
required_measurements: ordinary prose, code and JSON retention
identifier and entity recall across segments
state transplant and event replacement penalties
checkpoint, optimizer, corpus, split and recurrence-receipt digests
stop_conditions: correct slow state does not beat reset and matched ordinary controls
transplanted state or replaced events do not cause a directed penalty
event rate collapses to one event per byte or effectively zero events
gains disappear on fixed held-out sources
any execution lacks a verified recurrence receipt
claim_boundary: This file preregisters a gated experiment. It is not training evidence, a novelty result, or an admitted model.
